name: agent-skills
description: Frontal Labs collection of agent skills for the Frontal TypeScript SDK ecosystem (@frontal-labs/*)
author: Frontal Labs

frontal.name: Frontal Core
frontal.description: Foundational skill for @frontal-labs/* — unified Sdk class, FrontalClient, error handling, retries, pagination, and environment setup. Use whenever working with any Frontal SDK package.

frontal-ai.name: Frontal: AI & Inference
frontal-ai.description: Build AI features with @frontal-labs/ai — text generation, streaming, embeddings, structured outputs, multimodal (image/video/speech), and tool use. Use when integrating LLMs or AI inference.

frontal-agents.name: Frontal: Agents
frontal-agents.description: Build AI agents with @frontal-labs/agents — define, deploy, run executions, watch events via SSE. Use when creating agent workflows or orchestrating agent lifecycles.

frontal-workflows.name: Frontal: Workflows
frontal-workflows.description: Orchestrate workflows with @frontal-labs/workflows — approval chains, conditional logic, parallel branches, scheduled triggers. Use when building business processes or multi-step automation.

frontal-pipelines.name: Frontal: Pipelines
frontal-pipelines.description: Build data pipelines with @frontal-labs/pipelines — source ingestion, transformations, enrichment, validation, backfills. Use when orchestrating data flows.

frontal-graph.name: Frontal: Graph
frontal-graph.description: Query and mutate the knowledge graph with @frontal-labs/graph — entity CRUD, traversal, semantic search, relationships, time travel. Use when working with graph entities or knowledge graphs.

frontal-billing.name: Frontal: Billing
frontal-billing.description: Manage SaaS billing with @frontal-labs/billing — subscriptions, invoices, payment methods, metering, credits. Use when implementing billing or subscription features.

frontal-auth.name: Frontal: Auth
frontal-auth.description: Authenticate users with @frontal-labs/auth — sign-up/sign-in, MFA, OAuth, SSO, session management, admin APIs. Use when implementing login or identity features.

frontal-storage.name: Frontal: Storage
frontal-storage.description: Manage object storage with @frontal-labs/blob — upload, download, streaming, signed URLs, metadata, copy/move. Use when handling files or blob storage.

frontal-governance.name: Frontal: Governance
frontal-governance.description: Enforce policies and RBAC with @frontal-labs/governance — policies, roles, permissions, compliance assessments, violations. Use when implementing access control or compliance.

frontal-events.name: Frontal: Events
frontal-events.description: Pub/sub event bus with @frontal-labs/events — publish/subscribe, dead-letter queues, schema registry. Use when building event-driven architectures.

frontal-observability.name: Frontal: Observability
frontal-observability.description: Collect telemetry with @frontal-labs/observability — logs, metrics, traces, alerts, dashboards, OTLP export. Use when implementing monitoring or observability.

frontal-webhooks.name: Frontal: Webhooks
frontal-webhooks.description: Manage webhook endpoints with @frontal-labs/webhooks — create endpoints, verify HMAC, track delivery, retry rules. Use when receiving or delivering webhooks.

frontal-ontology.name: Frontal: Ontology
frontal-ontology.description: Manage domain models with @frontal-labs/ontology — validation, AI-powered generation, migrations, rules, mixins. Use when modeling domains or evolving schemas.

frontal-integrations.name: Frontal: Integrations
frontal-integrations.description: Execute third-party actions with @frontal-labs/integrations — Salesforce, Slack, Linear, and 20+ providers. Use when building cross-service workflows.

frontal-sandbox.name: Frontal: Sandbox
frontal-sandbox.description: Run isolated code execution with @frontal-labs/sandbox — compile-and-judge, multiple languages, resource limits. Use when executing untrusted code or coding challenges.

frontal-workers.name: Frontal: Workers
frontal-workers.description: Deploy edge workers with @frontal-labs/workers — serverless functions, eszip bundles, env vars. Use when deploying to the Frontal edge runtime.

frontal-datasets.name: Frontal: Datasets
frontal-datasets.description: Manage versioned datasets with @frontal-labs/datasets — CRUD, versioning, import/export, quality checks. Use when working with structured data or data versioning.

frontal-lineage.name: Frontal: Lineage
frontal-lineage.description: Trace data lineage with @frontal-labs/lineage — upstream/downstream impact, column-level lineage, Mermaid export. Use for impact analysis or compliance audits.
